era-of-embers.note: Stage 1 of 3 — the wolf form. Primary shape from original imprisonment. Objective: reach the Ever-Ember shrine.

biography.value:
Grafvitnir, the Grave-Wolf — Level 7 Solo

Supernatural, Huge

Stamina 200 | Speed 8 | Size Huge | Stability 5

Turns: 2 per round | Free Strike: 8 | EV: 108

Grafvitnir in his primary form — the shape he wore when first imprisoned. A wolf the size of a longhouse, fur black and matted with centuries of Rot, eyes the colour of the last thing that burns before it goes dark. He moves toward the Ever-Ember shrine with the specific purpose of something that has been waiting for a thousand years.

Main Attacks

Bite (Melee): +6 vs Might; 15 damage, target knocked Prone.

Paw Sweep (Close Burst 2): +5 vs Agility; 10 damage, targets Pushed 3 squares.

Root Surge (Ranged 8): +4 vs Agility; 8 damage, target Restrained (save ends).

Free Strike

Snap (Melee): +6 vs Might; 8 damage.

Villain Actions

Each usable once per encounter, max 1 per round; triggers at end of any hero's turn:

(VA1) Howl of Binding: All undead within 10 squares act immediately (free round of attacks against nearest targets). Coordinates external undead threats — if draugr are in the outer ward, they surge forward.

(VA2) Lunge: Grafvitnir moves up to his Speed and makes a Bite attack as part of this action. Does not provoke free strikes.

(VA3) Rot Breath: Close Burst 3, +5 vs Might; 12 damage, target Slowed (save ends).

Features

End Effect: When Grafvitnir starts his turn, he can take 10 damage to end one effect on him that a save ends.

Primordial Resilience: All damage from a single source is capped at 20. A hit that would deal 30 damage deals 20; a hit dealing 15 deals 15. No combination of effects can bypass this cap while Grafvitnir remains in wolf form.

Stage Transition at 0 Stamina: When reduced to 0 Stamina, Grafvitnir does not die. He collapses — falls INTO the stone floor, dissolving into the cracks, becoming roots. Stage 2 begins on his next turn.
biography.director:
TACTICAL GUIDANCE — STAGE 1:

Stage 1 is about positioning and protection. Grafvitnir's objective is the shrine, not the party. If he reaches the shrine uncontested, he immediately moves to Stage 2 and begins the flame-extinguishing process.

  • Round 1: Grafvitnir charges the shrine with both turns — one to advance, one to strike. VA1 (Howl of Binding) fires, coordinating external undead threats. The party intercepts.
  • Round 2: Still massive and powerful, but the party is learning his two-turn rhythm. Attacks land. VA2 (Lunge) breaks through the party's formation.
  • Rounds 3–4: Low Stamina. VA3 (Rot Breath) punishes anyone still clustered. Main attacks still deadly but all Villain Actions are spent. The party pushes through.
  • At 0 Stamina — Stage Transition: Grafvitnir collapses into the floor, dissolves into roots. Stage 2 begins.

PSYCHOLOGICAL SHIFT: The party must be defenders here, not aggressors. Grafvitnir is not trying to kill them — he is trying to get past them. If the party doesn't intercept, he simply walks to the shrine.

Expected Duration: 3–4 rounds.
